elements.original_description: A cartoon-style piggy bank in the center, surrounded by colorful coins and dollar bills floating around it. The piggy bank has a cheerful expression and is placed on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon style, featuring a cartoon-style piggy bank with a cheerful expression centered in the composition, surrounded by colorful coins and dollar bills floating dynamically around it, clean flat vector art with high contrast, on a pure white background, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks, bright and inviting color palette, crisp edges, high resolution.
